reason: Documentation integrity audit tooling is under development and not yet production-ready. Manual documentation review is performed during sprint planning and PR review cycles as an alternative control. The tool will be enabled once the docs-integrity-audit.ts script is completed, tested, and its CI integration is confirmed non-blocking for a baseline scan.
alternative_controls: Manual documentation review during PR review process
validate-sprint Gate 4 (docs hygiene) catches runtime artifacts under docs/
validate-sprint Gate 5 (metrics tracked state) ensures no untracked files under docs/metrics
acceptance_criteria: Baseline scan run with all findings triaged and resolved or waived
CI integration confirmed non-blocking on first full run
audit-matrix.yml updated to set enabled: true

risk_assessment.justification: Manual documentation review in place during PR process. Runtime artifact hygiene and untracked-file hygiene are covered by Gate 4 and Gate 5 of sprint validation. No documentation drift has been observed that would indicate material risk.
